title: Luxurious house with pool at 15 min from Provenza.
description: Step into the comfort of this luxurious 4 BR 5 Bath house with outstanding resort facilities in the serene neighborhood in Medellin. Situated in the sought-after residential community, the home promises a contemporary retreat surrounded by breathtaking nature and stunning scenery.A rich amenity list will make for a perfect stay.✔ Swimming Pool✔ Jacuzzi✔ Private Backyard✔ Cine✔ Fully Equipped Kitchen✔ Smart TVs✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi✔ Free ParkingSee more below!The spaceBreathtaking natural surroundings are complemented by the luxurious design and décor which spans throughout the entire interior of this sun-soaked home. As you enter the house, you're welcomed by a stylish yet comfortable open-plan living area, with a contemporary theme that enhances the breathtaking, unrestricted, and #instaworthy views!The fully equipped kitchen opens onto the entertaining living room, setting the tone for many memorable evenings. Bright marble floors and plenty of natural light coming through the large windows and glass terrace doors back the entire space in warm sunlight.But the best is yet to come - walk through the glass doors to the huge private yard with the swimming pool, providing endless dreamy views!★ LIVING ROOM ★Sit-back at the lavishly decorated fun zone that immediately feels like home and creates unforgettable moments with your friends.✔ Luxurious L-Shaped Sofa✔ City Views✔ Comfy Sofa Chair✔ Stylish Coffee Table✔ Access to the Outdoor Area★ KITCHEN & DINING ★It is fully equipped with state-of-the-art cooking appliances that will quickly turn you into a Michelin star chef. The kitchen is suitable for preparing any meal, whether it is a simple breakfast, quick snack, or a three-course gourmet dinner. Spacious countertops provide plenty of room for you to work your MasterChef magic.✔ Microwave✔ Stove✔ Oven✔ Refrigerator/Freezer✔ Dishwasher✔ Coffee Maker✔ Toaster✔ Blender✔ Sink - Hot & Cold Water✔ Trays✔ Glasses✔ Silverware✔ Pots & PansServe your delicious meals at the dining table situated right next to the kitchen. It offers an ideal setting for an unforgettable dinner.✔ Dining Table with Comfortable Chairs★ SLEEPING ARRANGEMENTS – 4 BEDROOMS ★After an exciting day of exploration and adventure in fascinating Medellín, you'll want to rest and recharge for an equally entertaining tomorrow. When you're ready to relax, head to one of our four comfortable rooms. ♛ Bedroom 1 ----- King-Size Bed♛ Bedroom 2 ----- King-Size Bed♛ Bedroom 3 ----- King-Size Bed♛ Bedroom 4 ----- King-Size BedAll bedrooms offer the same level 5* comfort and amenities. ✔ Smart TV✔ Pillows, Linens, and Sheets✔ Closet with Hangers and Shelves ✔ Night Stands with Reading Lamps✔ Access to the Outdoor Area✔ Ensuite Bathroom★ BATHROOMS ★The house feature four tastefully furnished full bathrooms. All are luxuriously designed and stocked with premium towels and essential toiletries, so you don't have to worry about bringing your own. ✔ Spacious Walk-In Shower Cabin✔ Wash Basin✔ Mirror✔ Toilet✔ Towels✔ Essential Toiletries★ OUTDOOR AREA ★Step out onto the private balcony with an incredible view of the entire city full of entertainment and relaxation.✔ Sun Lounges & Parasols	✔ Seating Area with Table and ChairsWe look forward to hosting you, and let us know if you have any questions; we have all the answers. Happy Travels!Guest accessThe entire house is exclusively yours, without interruption for the duration of your stay, so relax, unwind, and make yourself at home.Other than the already mentioned amenities, our house also features:✔ High-Speed Wi-Fi✔ Washer/Dryer✔ 24-Hour Camera Security✔ Free Private ParkingOther things to noteAre you planning a family gathering or a group get-together? Let our professionals help you get it settled!   These are some of our services:1. Airport Transfers to/from the listing 2. Money Exchange (Don’t Exchange at the airport) best daily rate! 3. Private Chef for your meals 4. Cleaning Service  5. Hang Over? Don’t worry we got you covered with our Recovery Drips! 6. Don’t want UBER? We got Private transportation, SUV Rentals. 7. Want Private security? We got it 8. Tours:  * ATVs * Horse Back Riding * Helicopter Tour * Pablo Escobar Tour * Tour Comuna 13 * Tour Guatape Rock * Guatape Boat Party 9. Covid - Test  Ran out of Cash? We Receive any International CardsRegistration Details79391
